faqs.question: 1. Where can I download the 1MAX app?

blocks.value: You can download the 1MAX app from:
For security reasons, always download the app from official sources only.

faqs.question: 2. How do I install the app safely?

blocks.value: To ensure a safe installation:

value: Do not install apps from third-party websites or unknown links
Keep your device operating system up to date

blocks.value: Avoid sharing your login credentials with anyone.

faqs.question: 3. What devices and operating systems are supported?

blocks.value: The 1MAX app supports:

value: Android devices running supported system versions
iOS devices running supported system versions

blocks.value: If your device does not meet system requirements, the app may not install or function properly.

faqs.question: 4. What should I do if the app doesn’t install?

blocks.value: If installation fails:

value: Ensure your system version is supported
Restart your device and try again

blocks.value: If the issue persists, please contact 1MAX Customer Support.

faqs.question: 5. Can I use the same account on the app and website?

blocks.value: Yes. Your 1MAX account can be used across the app and website.
Log in with the same credentials to access your balances, trading history, and account settings.

faqs.question: 6. Why can’t I log in to the app?

blocks.value: Login issues may occur due to:
Please ensure your information is correct and try again.

faqs.question: 7. Unable to log in due to a restricted location?

blocks.value: Access to the 1MAX website and app is restricted for users located in:
Users accessing from restricted regions may be unable to log in or use platform services.
Yes. The 1MAX app uses security measures such as:
Users are also responsible for securing their devices and login credentials.

faqs.question: 9. What should I do if the app crashes or freezes?

blocks.value: If the app becomes unresponsive:

value: Ensure you are using the latest app version

blocks.value: If the issue continues, contact 1MAX Customer Support for assistance

faqs.question: 10. Are all website features available on the app?

blocks.value: Most core features are available on the app.
Some advanced features or settings may be accessible only via the website.

faqs.question: 11. What should I do if I lose my phone?

blocks.value: If you lose access to your device:

value: Contact 1MAX Customer Support for account protection

blocks.value: Prompt action helps prevent unauthorized access.

faqs.question: 12. Who can I contact for app-related issues?

blocks.value: For any app-related questions or technical issues, please contact 1MAX Customer Support through official support channels.
